eas_text: A civil authority has issued AN ADMINISTRATIVE MESSAGE for the following counties or areas: Maricopa, AZ; at 08:34 PM ON MAY 7, 2026 Effective until 04:34 AM MAY 8, 2026. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: A SAFE Alert has been issued for Maricopa County. This is the Arizona Department of Public Safety. The Gilbert Police Department is looking for 70 year old Lloyd Brown last seen on foot wearing a blue and white checkered button-up shirt, gray shorts, and black shoes. If you have contact with this SAFE Alert, please call 911. Monitor TV and Radio for updates.
